name: emoji-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Sovereign AI tools for everyone.

tools.name: search_emoji
tools.description: Search for emojis by keyword or name.

tools.name: suggest_for_text
tools.description: Suggest relevant emojis for a given text based on sentiment/content.

tools.name: emoji_to_text
tools.description: Convert emojis in text to their text descriptions.

tools.name: count_emojis
tools.description: Count and categorize emojis in text.
